# Repository instructions

## Build
- Run: npm install
- Run: npm run build

## Test
- Run: npm test

## Lint
- Run: npm run lint

## Important directories
- /docs contains the implementation plan and progress notes
- /.github/workflows contains CI workflows
- Update docs when behavior changes

## Expectations
- Read /docs before coding
- Prefer larger cohesive changes over tiny scattered edits
- Keep deletions minimal
- Fix CI/workflow issues when they block or relate to the plan
- Do not finish until validation passes
